featureName: Google Keep Live Sync (gkeepapi production hardening)

scenarios.title: Three-Mirror Manifest Carries KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit contract test proves all three mirrors (Go, YAML, shell) carry KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD; removing the key from any mirror fails the test.

scenarios.title: Compose Injects KEEP_GOOGLE_EMAIL and KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD Into Sidecar
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live disposable stack proves smackerel-ml has both env vars set. Per SCN-059-002 planning B1 resolution (option c), KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD IS materially present in the core container env via the shared app.env file (same precedent as TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN); the sidecar boundary is enforced at the application layer (zero references to KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD in Go source).

scenarios.title: drift_ack_token Round-Trips Through parseKeepConfig
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit tests prove positive parse, empty-default, and rejection of non-string values.

scenarios.title: Missing KEEP_GOOGLE_EMAIL Fails Loud At Go-Core Connect() When Live Mode Is Enabled
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit tests prove Connect() fails before any NATS publish when KEEP_GOOGLE_EMAIL is empty; the boundary regression proves the Go core still has zero references to KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD (password validation moved to the sidecar handshake — see SCN-059-019).

scenarios.title: Poll-Interval Floor Is A Single Value
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit test proves below-floor values are rejected at parse time using the single named constant.

scenarios.title: Go Connector Publishes keep.sync.request And Parses Reply
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live integration proves end-to-end request/reply round-trip on the test stack.

scenarios.title: Sidecar Subscribes And Replies With Schema-Conformant Payload
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live sidecar boot proves the keep subscriber registers alongside existing Drive/Photos/YouTube subscribers.

scenarios.title: Hybrid Mode Dedups By note_id Across Takeout And gkeepapi
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live store proves a single artifact key collapses Takeout-origin and gkeepapi-origin notes with the same note_id.

scenarios.title: validateGkeepResponse Catches All Schema Drift Classes
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit per-mutation matrix proves every defined drift class is rejected.

scenarios.title: Breaker Transitions closed -> tripping -> open -> closed
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live integration proves a real malformed-response stream trips the breaker after the 4th failure.

scenarios.title: Sidecar Auth Errors Do NOT Count As Drift
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit test proves auth-error prefix is classified as Connect-fatal, not drift.

scenarios.title: Successful Sync Resets driftFailures In TRIPPING
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit test proves the TRIPPING -> CLOSED transition on success.

scenarios.title: Drift Counter Increments Exactly Once Per State Entry Into OPEN
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live /metrics scrape proves counter cardinality and once-per-open-entry semantics.

scenarios.title: Health Reports HealthError While Breaker Is OPEN
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit test proves Health() transitions track the breaker state.

scenarios.title: Sync Duration Histogram And Notes Counter Populated On Success
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live /metrics endpoint exposes the three new metrics with stable label sets and no credential material.

scenarios.title: Operator Can Complete Enablement Using Only Documented ./smackerel.sh Commands
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Grep over the new subsection confirms zero ad-hoc docker compose / pytest / python3 / go test invocations.

scenarios.title: Operator Can Recover From A Tripped Breaker From The Runbook Alone
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Manual review confirms recovery uses drift_ack_token rotation + restart and references docs/Deployment.md for bundle redeploy.

scenarios.title: Runbook Carries No Env-Specific Values
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: pii-scan.sh exits 0 over the staged diff that introduces the new subsection.

scenarios.title: Sidecar Handshake Rejects Empty KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD And Surfaces As Fail-Loud Connect() Error
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live sidecar boot with empty KEEP_GOOGLE_APP_PASSWORD proves Go Connect() returns the sidecar error verbatim and emits zero keep.sync.request publishes; the boundary test proves the Go core never references the password key.
